record_types.name: GF_Point

subprograms.code:
function "+"
  (Left : GF_Point; Right : GFX.Vectors.GF_Vector) return GF_Point

function "-"
  (Left : GF_Point; Right : GF_Point) return GFX.Vectors.GF_Vector

function "-"
  (Left : GF_Point; Right : GFX.Vectors.GF_Vector) return GF_Point
